mainBanner.heading: We use cookies
mainBanner.htmlText: We and our partners use cookies and similar technologies to personalise content, analyse traffic, and show targeted advertising. You can accept all, reject non-essential cookies, or manage your preferences.

preferenceModal.heading: Privacy Preferences
preferenceModal.htmlText: Choose which types of cookies you allow. You can change your settings at any time by revisiting this panel.

categories.heading: Strictly Necessary
categories.htmlText: Essential cookies required for core website functionality. Cannot be disabled.

categories.heading: Analytics
categories.htmlText: Help us understand how visitors interact with our site using anonymous statistics.

categories.heading: Marketing
categories.htmlText: Deliver relevant advertisements and measure campaign effectiveness.

gpcBanner.heading: Global Privacy Control Detected
gpcBanner.htmlText: We have recognised your Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal and applied your opt-out preference. You can review your settings at any time.
